retry_reason: If the fence pointer is NULL or the refcount is zero, the fence is dead or never existed; retrying will not resurrect it.
contract_summary: RCU-protected get-wrapper: acquires a reference on the dma_fence stored in evf_mgr->ev_fence if the fence is still alive (refcount non-zero). Returns NULL if the fence is NULL or dying (refcount zero). The caller must check the return value and, if non-NULL, must call dma_fence_put() to release the reference when done. The RCU read lock is only held temporarily during the get operation, so the returned fence can be used without further RCU protection, but the caller must ensure proper synchronization if the manager's fence pointer can change concurrently.
